title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.620 - Rerecording — free of charge, when
text:
59.620.  Rerecording — free of charge, when. — Such conveyances as have been spread of record, together with the certificate of record thereof, shall be rerecorded free of charge to the holders thereof, provided the same be offered for record within five years after the destruction of the record.
(RSMo 1939 § 3647) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3257; 1919 § 10619; 1909 § 10430
